title: hydrangea serratifolia
intro: Hydrangea serratifolia, also known as Chinese hydrangea or water hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hydrangea serratifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support kidney and liver function. In herbal preparations, Hydrangea serratifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
